# Native ChatGPT Incoming PNGs

Current state: the prior combined native sheet is rejected for canon/art-direction mismatch and is preserved only as evidence. Do not alpha-clean it.

Generate one native ChatGPT PNG per Bosch House Act 1 target and drop it here. Use exact flat #FF00FF backgrounds. Do not use a combined sheet unless Nick explicitly asks for a crop-manifest review path.

Expected filenames:

- bosch_default_candidate.png
- guardian_placeholder.png
- cousin_placeholder.png
- signal_pet_modem.png
- proof_token_charm.png
- proof_token_bowl.png
- receipt_router.png

`*_0001.png` and `*-0001.png` are also accepted.
